arts.sum: Raul Asencio has been a standout performer for Real Madrid over the last few months, and that has earned him a regular starting spot. Because of this, he has also been tipped to feature for the Spanish national team in the coming months. arts.ttl: Real Madrid Become First Team in History to Reach Champions League Milestone
arts.sum: Real Madrid are now the first and only club in Champions League history to play 500 matches in the European competition.
